name: pi-macos-voice
description: Native macOS dictation + text-to-speech bridge for the pi coding agent.

scripts.build: npm run gen-version && npm run build:swift && npm run install-bin && npm run build:app
scripts.install-bin: mkdir -p bin && cp "$(swift build --package-path swyft -c release --show-bin-path)/swyft" bin/swyft && chmod +x bin/swyft && codesign --force --sign - bin/swyft
